About Velantra

We Connect the Systems Your Business Runs On

Velantra is a business technology company built on more than 25 years of industry and operational experience. We help organizations improve efficiency, strengthen operational control, and accelerate digital transformation through practical, scalable, and integrated technology solutions.

Explore Solutions → Book a Demo

AI + ERP ConnectIntelligent reporting
Our Vision

Technology That Works With Your Business

Our vision is to help organizations build smarter, more connected, and more efficient workplaces by combining deep operational expertise with modern technology. We believe technology should solve real business challenges, support growth, and create measurable value.

At Velantra, we focus on building long-term partnerships with our clients by providing reliable solutions, continuous improvement, and ongoing support. As businesses evolve, our solutions evolve with them, ensuring sustained value and future readiness.

Organizations choose Velantra because of our industry knowledge, hands-on experience, customer-first approach, and commitment to delivering technology that creates meaningful business outcomes. Our growing portfolio, including SmartGate, Smart HR, and Smart ID, reflects our mission to help businesses operate smarter, safer, and more efficiently.

What Velantra Covers

Four connected capabilities for daily operations.

Integration & intelligent reporting

Our Approach

How We Think About Technology

We don't build features. We solve business problems that have real operational and financial consequences.

Practical Over Impressive

We favour technology that works reliably in the field, at a security gate, on a shop floor, or at a construction site, over technology that only looks good in a demo.

Connected by Design

Every solution we build is designed to share data with the others. Integration is part of the product, not an afterthought.

AI That Earns Its Place

We apply AI where it reduces genuine manual effort, generates reports faster, surfaces patterns, and answers business questions in plain language.

Our Solutions

Four Pillars. One Partner.

Each Velantra solution is complete on its own. Together, they give your business a level of operational clarity that no single-point tool can match.

Gate & Facility Management

SmartGate

SmartGate brings visitors, materials, vehicles, and contractors under one platform, replacing paper registers and phone-call approvals with real-time digital control at every gate.

  • Zero unauthorized entry or exit
  • Every gate transaction timestamped and audit-ready
  • Security, admin, and management each see what they need
  • Works across multiple gates and facilities
Explore SmartGate →
Human Resource Management

Smart HR

Smart HR covers the full employee lifecycle, from recruitment and onboarding through attendance, leave, performance, and payroll, in one system HR teams and managers can use every day.

  • Payroll that runs accurately without manual reconciliation
  • Attendance and leave managed without spreadsheets
  • Performance tracked and acted on throughout the year
  • Complete workforce visibility for management
Explore Smart HR →
Employee Companion App

Smart ID

Smart ID puts employees in control of their workday, from marking attendance and applying leave to submitting expenses and receiving company announcements.

  • Employees self-serve without HR involvement
  • Managers approve and act from their phone
  • Works with your current HR infrastructure
  • Mobile-friendly, built for where people actually work
Explore Smart ID →
AI Integration & Intelligent Reporting

AI + ERP Connect

Velantra's AI integration layer sits on top of your existing ERP without replacing it. Ask questions in plain language, get reports in seconds, and connect HR, gate, and operational data to the records your ERP already holds.

  • Connects to your ERP with no replacement project
  • Natural language queries on your own business data
  • Automated reports delivered on schedule
  • Anomaly detection and trend alerts without manual analysis
How We Work

A Partner, Not Just a Client

We don't hand over software and walk away. We work alongside your team from understanding to outcomes.

Assess Your Needs

We analyze your existing processes, security requirements, workforce challenges, and operational goals to identify the best-fit solution.

Configure & Integrate

Our team customizes the platform and connects it with your existing systems, ensuring a seamless deployment experience.

Train & Empower

We provide practical training and guidance to administrators, managers, and employees for maximum adoption.

Support & Grow

We continuously support your organization with updates, enhancements, and recommendations as your needs evolve.

Why Velantra

What Makes Us Different

There are many software vendors. There are very few partners who understand operations, technology, and integration equally well.

Built to Connect

Our solutions are designed from the ground up to integrate with each other and with your ERP.

Operations-First Thinking

We build for daily users: security guards, HR officers, plant managers, and operations teams.

AI Without the Hype

We add AI only where it saves time, removes manual work, or surfaces something genuinely useful.

Works With What You Have

We don't ask you to replace your ERP or start over. We connect to your existing systems.

Present When It Counts

We are based in India and serve businesses across sectors with people who know your setup.

Accountable by Default

Every system creates an audit trail, every integration is documented, and every deployment is owned.

Industries

Where Velantra Works

Any organization that manages people, facilities, and systems has a place for Velantra.

ManufacturingCorporate OfficesLogistics & WarehousingConstruction & InfrastructureTransportation & Logistics Hubs
